title: Phase 1: Categorized Logger Utility
description: Create a new categorized Logger utility that serves as a drop-in replacement for the current logger. Must support categories and be TUI-ready.
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] LogCategory type with all 10 categories defined
- [ ] New Logger class with category-aware methods
- [ ] Event emitter for TUI integration
- [ ] Ring buffer for last N log entries (configurable, default 1000)
- [ ] File logging preserved (backward compatible)
- [ ] Unit tests for logger functionality

title: Phase 2: TUI Framework Setup
description: Set up the TUI framework using terminal-kit (already installed). Create the basic layout structure with panels.
design:
## Layout Structure

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  HEADER: Node info, status, version                             в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ  TABS: Category selection                                        в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ                                                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  LOG AREA: Scrollable log display                               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                                  в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ  FOOTER: Controls and status                                     в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

## Components

1. **TUIManager** - Main orchestrator
2. **HeaderPanel** - Node info display
3. **TabBar** - Category tabs
4. **LogPanel** - Scrollable log view
5. **FooterPanel** - Controls and input

## terminal-kit Features to Use

- ScreenBuffer for double-buffering
- Input handling (keyboard shortcuts)
- Color support
- Box drawing characters
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] TUIManager class created
- [ ] Basic layout with 4 panels renders correctly
- [ ] Terminal resize handling
- [ ] Keyboard input capture working
- [ ] Clean exit handling (restore terminal state)

title: Phase 5: Migrate Existing Logging
description: Replace all existing console.log, term.*, and Logger calls with the new categorized logger throughout the codebase.
design:
## Migration Strategy

1. Create compatibility layer in old Logger that redirects to new
2. Map existing tags to categories:
   - `[MAIN]`, `[BOOTSTRAP]` вҶ’ CORE
   - `[RPC]`, `[SERVER]` вҶ’ NETWORK
   - `[PEER]`, `[PEERROUTINE]` вҶ’ PEER
   - `[CHAIN]`, `[BLOCK]`, `[MEMPOOL]` вҶ’ CHAIN
   - `[SYNC]`, `[MAINLOOP]` вҶ’ SYNC
   - `[CONSENSUS]`, `[PORBFT]` вҶ’ CONSENSUS
   - `[GCR]`, `[IDENTITY]` вҶ’ IDENTITY
   - `[MCP]` вҶ’ MCP
   - `[XM]`, `[MULTICHAIN]` вҶ’ MULTICHAIN
   - `[DAHR]`, `[WEB2]` вҶ’ DAHR

3. Search and replace patterns:
   - `console.log(...)` вҶ’ `logger.info('CATEGORY', ...)`
   - `term.green(...)` вҶ’ `logger.info('CATEGORY', ...)`
   - `log.info(...)` вҶ’ `logger.info('CATEGORY', ...)`

## Files to Update (174+ console.log calls)

- src/index.ts (25 calls)
- src/utilities/*.ts
- src/libs/**/*.ts
- src/features/**/*.ts
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] All console.log calls replaced
- [ ] All term.* calls replaced
- [ ] All old Logger calls migrated
- [ ] No terminal output bypasses TUI
- [ ] Lint passes
- [ ] Type-check passes
notes:
Core migration complete:
- Replaced src/utilities/logger.ts with re-export of LegacyLoggerAdapter
- All existing log.* calls now route through CategorizedLogger
- Migrated console.log and term.* calls in index.ts (main entry point)
- Migrated mainLoop.ts

Remaining legacy calls (lower priority):
- ~129 console.log calls in 20 files (many in tests/client/cli)
- ~56 term.* calls in 13 files (excluding TUIManager which needs them)

The core logging infrastructure is now TUI-ready. Legacy calls will still work but bypass TUI display.

title: Phase 4: Info Panel and Controls
description: Implement the header info panel showing node status and the footer with control commands.
design:
## Header Panel Info

- Node version
- Status indicator (рҹҹў Running / рҹҹЎ Syncing / рҹ”ҙ Stopped)
- Public key (truncated with copy option)
- Server port
- Connected peers count
- Current block number
- Sync status

## Footer Controls

- **[S]** - Start node (if stopped)
- **[P]** - Pause/Stop node
- **[R]** - Restart node
- **[Q]** - Quit application
- **[L]** - Toggle log level filter
- **[F]** - Filter/Search logs
- **[C]** - Clear current log view
- **[H]** - Help overlay

## Real-time Updates

- Subscribe to sharedState for live updates
- Peer count updates
- Block number updates
- Sync status changes
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Header shows all node info
- [ ] Info updates in real-time
- [ ] All control keys functional
- [ ] Start/Stop/Restart commands work
- [ ] Help overlay accessible
- [ ] Graceful quit (cleanup)

title: Phase 3: Log Display with Tabs
description: Implement the tabbed log display with filtering by category. Users can switch between All logs and category-specific views.
design:
## Tab Structure

- **[All]** - Shows all logs from all categories
- **[Core]** - CORE category only
- **[Network]** - NETWORK category only
- **[Peer]** - PEER category only
- **[Chain]** - CHAIN category only
- **[Sync]** - SYNC category only
- **[Consensus]** - CONSENSUS category only
- **[Identity]** - IDENTITY category only
- **[MCP]** - MCP category only
- **[XM]** - MULTICHAIN category only
- **[DAHR]** - DAHR category only

## Navigation

- Number keys 0-9 for quick tab switching
- Arrow keys for tab navigation
- Tab key to cycle through tabs

## Log Display Features

- Color-coded by log level (green=info, yellow=warning, red=error, magenta=debug)
- Auto-scroll to bottom (toggle with 'A')
- Manual scroll with Page Up/Down, Home/End
- Search/filter with '/' key
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Tab bar with all categories displayed
- [ ] Tab switching via keyboard (numbers, arrows, tab)
- [ ] Log filtering by selected category works
- [ ] Color-coded log levels
- [ ] Scrolling works (auto and manual)
- [ ] Visual indicator for active tab

title: Phase 6: Testing and Polish
description: Final testing, edge case handling, documentation, and polish for the TUI implementation.
design:
## Testing Scenarios

1. Normal startup and operation
2. Multiple nodes on same machine
3. Terminal resize during operation
4. High log volume stress test
5. Long-running stability test
6. Graceful shutdown scenarios
7. Error recovery

## Polish Items

1. Smooth scrolling animations
2. Loading indicators
3. Timestamp formatting options
4. Log export functionality
5. Configuration persistence

## Documentation

1. Update README with TUI usage
2. Keyboard shortcuts reference
3. Configuration options
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] All test scenarios pass
- [ ] No memory leaks in long-running test
- [ ] Terminal state always restored on exit
- [ ] Documentation complete
- [ ] README updated

title: TUI Implementation - Epic
description: Transform the Demos node from a scrolling wall of text into a proper TUI (Terminal User Interface) with categorized logging, tabbed views, control panel, and node info display.
